source: AI Radar hot AI news feed

items.title: Zhipu AI launches ZCode to challenge Claude Code and OpenAI Codex at a fraction of the cost
items.summary: Zhipu AI is bringing GLM-5.2 to its ZCode development environment, pitching the model's long-context capabilities for complex coding tasks. New customers get a free five-day trial with up to 5 million tokens per day, and subscribers receive about 1.5 times more token quota through July 2026....

items.title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
items.summary: Tin AI từ Google DeepMind về "Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership". Mở bài gốc để đọc chi tiết và đánh giá tác động với team.

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.title: Claude Reaches GA on Microsoft Foundry: European Enterprises Cannot Deploy It
items.summary: Claude models reached GA on Microsoft Foundry with Azure-native billing and governance, but no European data zone exists. Anthropic's own documentation confirms data residency guarantees apply to Bedrock and Vertex AI but not Foundry. European practitioners from banking and healthcare report the offering is unapproved for production. By Steef-Jan Wiggers

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

items.title: Investing in multi-agent AI safety research
items.summary: Google DeepMind and partners announce a $10M funding call for multi-agent safety research.

items.title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now available on AWS
items.summary: OpenAI frontier models and Codex are now generally available on AWS, giving enterprises a new path to build with OpenAI through the AWS environments, controls, and procurement workflows they already use. Customers can get started with OpenAI on AWS and move faster from evaluation to production.

items.title: Anthropic is discussing a new custom chip with Samsung
items.summary: The news comes about a week after OpenAI announced its own custom AI chip in a partnership with Broadcom.

items.title: Microsoft Brings AI-Powered Vulnerability Remediation to Azure DevOps with Copilot Autofix
items.summary: Microsoft has announced the limited public preview of Copilot Autofix for GitHub Advanced Security for Azure DevOps, extending AI-powered vulnerability remediation to teams using Azure Repos. By Craig Risi

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

items.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
items.summary: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

items.title: Presentation: Fine Tuning the Enterprise: Reinforcement Learning in Practice
items.summary: The speakers discuss Agent RFT, OpenAI’s platform for fine-tuning reasoning models via real-time tool interactions and custom reward signals. They explain how reinforcement learning solves complex credit assignment challenges within the context window. They share enterprise success stories, showing how Agent RFT eliminates long-tail token loops and drives extreme efficiency. By Wenjie Zi, Will Hang
